# DMD Furnishing

## About
DMD Furnishing is a B2B commercial furniture manufacturer specializing in hospitality FF&E (Furniture, Fixtures & Equipment). Based in Foxboro, Massachusetts, we design, manufacture, and install custom furniture for hotels, restaurants, offices, and institutional spaces nationwide.

## Contact
- Phone: +1 (617) 223-7781
- Email: Sales@DMDFurnishing.com
- Address: 56 Leonard St Unit 5, Foxboro, MA 02035

## Services
- Custom Casegoods & Millwork
- Seating & Upholstered Furniture
- FF&E Procurement & Sourcing
- Delivery, Installation & Project Coordination
- Value Engineering
- Design Consultation

## Markets Served
- Hotels & Motels (guest rooms, lobbies, common areas)
- Restaurants & Cafes (dining, outdoor seating)
- Corporate Offices & Workspaces (ergonomic seating, workstations)
- Educational Facilities (classrooms, dormitories, libraries)
- Healthcare Facilities (waiting areas, administrative spaces)
- Franchise Renovation Projects

## Process
1. Consultation & Scope Review
2. Design, BOQ & Material Finalization
3. Manufacturing & Quality Assurance
4. Delivery, Installation & Close-Out

## Materials
- HPL and scratch-resistant laminates
- Veneer and solid wood
- Metal structures and commercial-grade hardware
- Custom finishes and textures

## Industry Glossary

### FF&E (Furniture, Fixtures & Equipment)
All movable items in a commercial space — beds, desks, chairs, lighting, drapery, and decorative accessories — not permanently attached to the building structure. FF&E budgets typically represent 15-25% of total hotel construction costs.

### Casegoods
Hard-surface furniture such as dressers, nightstands, desks, credenzas, and wardrobes. In commercial manufacturing, casegoods are typically constructed from engineered wood, hardwood veneers, HPL, or solid wood.

### BOQ (Bill of Quantities)
A detailed document listing all furniture items, quantities, dimensions, materials, and finishes required for a project. The BOQ serves as the primary reference for quoting, manufacturing, and delivery coordination.

### HPL (High-Pressure Laminate)
A durable, scratch-resistant surface material made by fusing layers of kraft paper and decorative paper under high heat and pressure. Preferred for hotel casegoods, restaurant tables, and office surfaces.

### Value Engineering
The process of analyzing materials, construction methods, and design details to reduce cost without compromising quality, durability, or visual intent.

## FAQs

### Is the consultation free?
Yes, the initial 30-minute consultation is completely free with no obligation.

### Do I need finalized drawings?
No, we can start with rough concepts or floor plans.

### Can you work with my designer or architect?
Yes, we often collaborate with design teams to ensure manufacturability and budget alignment.

### Do you handle small renovations?
Yes, we assist with renovations of all sizes — from refreshing a lobby to renovating a block of hotel rooms.

### Do you offer value engineering?
Yes, value engineering is a core part of our service to help achieve design vision within budget.

## Products
DMD Furnishing offers 475+ commercial furniture items across six hospitality market categories:
- Hotel and Lodging: guestroom furniture, lobby seating, casegoods, soft seating
- Restaurant and Food Service: dining chairs, bar stools, booths, tables
- Healthcare: patient room furniture, waiting room seating, administrative furniture
- Education: classroom chairs, lounge furniture, dormitory casegoods
- Corporate and Office: conference room furniture, lounge seating, collaborative spaces
- Multi-family and Residential: apartment and condominium common area furniture

All products are available for custom specification. Contact DMD for quote requests and project consultation.

## Projects
DMD Furnishing has completed commercial furniture installations for hospitality properties including hotels, restaurants, healthcare facilities, and multi-family residential developments. The portfolio spans projects across the United States, from boutique hotels to large institutional clients.

## Target Audience
- FF&E procurement teams and project managers
- Hospitality developers and property owners
- Interior designers and architects specifying commercial furniture
- General contractors managing FF&E scopes
- Hotel operators and restaurant groups

## Geographic Coverage
Headquartered in Foxboro, Massachusetts. Serving hospitality clients and commercial projects nationwide. Showroom available by appointment.
